app.name: Save My Brain
app.description: Process documents, track deadlines, manage finances — so you can stop worrying.

landing.hero_title: Save your Brain from household paperwork
landing.hero_subtitle: Because life admin shouldn't cost you brain cells.
landing.hero_sub: Upload bank statements, insurance, bills, receipts. AI organizes, tracks deadlines, and answers questions — so you don't have to.
landing.phone_caption:
Manage everything
from your phone
via Telegram

steps.title: Upload
steps.desc: Drop any PDF, photo, or screenshot into Telegram.

steps.title: AI Reads
steps.desc: Extracts dates, amounts, names, and red flags automatically.

steps.title: Ask Anything
steps.desc: "When does Mom's insurance expire?" — instant answer.

landing.bottom_headline: Stop losing brain cells to paperwork
landing.bottom_sub: Start organizing in 30 seconds. No signup required.
landing.features_title: What Save My Brain does for you

features.title: Document Intelligence
features.desc: Send any receipt, bill, contract, or ID. AI extracts key details, flags red flags, tracks expiry dates.

features.title: Financial Tracking
features.desc: Automatic spending categorization from receipts and statements. Monthly summaries by category.

features.title: Insurance Overview
features.desc: Track all your policies. Get gap analysis when you have multiple policies. Never miss a renewal.

features.title: Deadline Alerts
features.desc: Passport expiry, contract renewals, payment deadlines — all tracked and reminded automatically.

features.title: Smart Tasks
features.desc: Auto-created action items from your documents. Prioritized by urgency. Nothing falls through the cracks.

features.title: Family Admin
features.desc: Tag documents to family members. Keep everyone's important files organized in one place.

personas.title: Busy professionals
personas.desc: Too many bills, contracts, and deadlines to keep track of

personas.title: Parents
personas.desc: School notices, medical records, insurance — for the whole family

personas.title: Property owners
personas.desc: Tenancy agreements, utility bills, maintenance records

personas.title: Frequent travelers
personas.desc: Passports, visas, bookings, travel insurance — always current

personas.title: Caring for elderly parents
personas.desc: Medical records, insurance policies, important documents — all in one place

onboarding.consent_intro: I'm your household document assistant. Upload any document — I'll organize it and remember everything.
onboarding.privacy_body: Documents are processed then deleted. No selling your data, no AI training.
onboarding.household_title: Who do you manage documents for?
onboarding.family_hint: Type one name per line. Up to 7 people.
onboarding.family_note: You can add or delete anytime — just tell me.
onboarding.family_too_many: You entered {count} names, but I can only add up to 7 people. Please shorten the list.
onboarding.complete_body: Your AI brain is ready. Start uploading documents — I'll handle the paperwork.

dashboard.no_documents: No documents yet. Send a photo or PDF to your Telegram bot to get started.
dashboard.no_tasks: No tasks yet. Tasks are auto-created from your documents.
dashboard.chat_placeholder: Ask me anything about your documents...
dashboard.chat_empty_title: Welcome! Let's get your brain organized.
dashboard.chat_empty_hint: Start by uploading a document — a bill, receipt, insurance policy, or anything with important info.
dashboard.empty_example_1: What documents do I have on file?
dashboard.empty_example_2: Are there any expiry dates coming up?
dashboard.empty_example_3: Show me a summary of my spending this month.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.powered_by: Powered by Claude AI from Anthropic
